title: parosela lasiostachya var. glabrescens
intro: Parosela lasiostachya var. glabrescens is a plant species, also known as the 'parosela', which belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Parosela lasiostachya var. glabrescens have been studied, and it is known to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to treat fever, colds, and other respiratory issues due to its decongestant and expectorant properties. Parosela lasiostachya var. glabrescens can be used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
